seo.title: Multi-Purpose Products Image – AI Product Photo Generator | OpenCreator
seo.description: Generate complete product image sets with AI—detail shots, model lifestyle scenes, and still life photography from a single reference photo. Powered by Nano Banana Pro for e-commerce and brand marketing.

hero.title: Multi-Purpose Products Image
hero.description: Generate a complete set of product images from a single reference photo—detail close-ups, model lifestyle scenes, and professional still life photography. GPT-5.2 analyzes your product and creates optimized prompts, while Nano Banana Pro generates high-quality images for e-commerce listings and brand marketing.

steps.title: Upload product reference image
steps.description: Provide a single product photo as reference. The AI will analyze its features, colors, and style to generate multiple types of product imagery while maintaining strict consistency.

steps.title: AI generates detail shot prompts
steps.description: Nano Banana Pro creates 3 professional detail close-up images—shoulder strap views, surface textures, and side angles that showcase craftsmanship and material quality.

steps.title: Generate model lifestyle scenes
steps.description: GPT-5.2 creates 3 lifestyle scene prompts featuring young Chinese models in artistic, real-world settings. Nano Banana Pro then generates these editorial-style photos.

steps.title: Create still life product photos
steps.description: GPT-5.2 generates 3 high-end still life prompts with sophisticated backgrounds and lighting. The final output includes commercial-grade product photography ready for brand use.

whoIsFor.title: Built for e-commerce brands and product marketers
whoIsFor.subtitle: From fashion brands to product photographers, see who creates product images with AI.

items.question: What is the Multi-Purpose Products Image workflow?
items.answer: This AI-powered workflow generates a complete set of product images from a single reference photo: 3 detail close-ups, 3 model lifestyle scenes, and 3 still life photos—9 professional images total for e-commerce and brand marketing.

items.question: What AI models power this workflow?
items.answer: The workflow uses GPT-5.2 for intelligent prompt generation based on product analysis, and Nano Banana Pro for high-quality image generation that maintains product consistency across all output types.

items.question: What kind of detail shots are generated?
items.answer: The workflow creates close-up images showcasing different product angles and features—like shoulder straps, surface textures, and side profiles—with soft studio lighting and professional photography quality.

items.question: How do the model lifestyle scenes work?
items.answer: GPT-5.2 generates scene descriptions featuring young models in artistic, real-world settings that match your product's style. The scenes have depth and atmosphere without being overly staged.

items.question: What makes the still life photos special?
items.answer: The still life images are generated with high-end brand advertising aesthetics—sophisticated backgrounds, professional lighting, and compositions suitable for lookbooks and marketing campaigns.

items.question: Will my product look consistent across all images?
items.answer: Yes. Nano Banana Pro strictly follows the reference image for product shape, proportions, colors, and design details. The workflow explicitly prevents any modification or stylization of the product itself.

items.question: What products work best with this workflow?
items.answer: The workflow excels with fashion accessories, bags, apparel, and lifestyle products. It's optimized for items that benefit from detail shots, model presentation, and still life photography.

items.question: How does pricing work for this workflow?
items.answer: Credits are consumed based on the AI models used. With 9 images generated per run using Nano Banana Pro (50% discount), it's highly cost-effective compared to traditional product photography.
